# solpoll — Client (Frontend)

This directory contains the Next.js frontend for the solpoll dApp.

**Notice:** This client-side code was generated by agentic AI and reviewed by a human.

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 16 / React 19
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Solana wallet adapters (Phantom, Solflare, Backpack, etc.)
- Anchor (`@coral-xyz/anchor`) for on-chain interaction

## Getting Started

```bash
pnpm dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) with your browser to see the result.
